name: @qf-jarvis/event-ingestion
description: QF Jarvis event-ingestion trust boundary. Stage 3.2 provides pure, synchronous Ed25519 signature verification and a public-key registry; Stage 3.3 slice 1 adds a pure, database-free semantic-digest foundation (deterministic canonical JSON + SHA-256) that is compiled INTERNALLY and not publicly exported — only a later validated-ingestion composition may call it. Still no database, no ingest function, no persistence. node:crypto only; zero third-party runtime dependencies.
